title: SignedAuditArtifact
description: The ordered audit event log for a run, together with a chained hash and HMAC signature for tamper detection. All property names are camelCase.

AuditView.title: AuditView
AuditView.description: A single audit event emitted during the run.

nodeId.description: Id of the node this event relates to.

phase.description: Pipeline phase in which the event was emitted (e.g. 'resolve', 'policy', 'exec', 'verify').

events.description: All audit events in ascending sequence order.

chainHash.description: SHA-256 hash chain over all events (hex-encoded). Each event's hash includes the previous hash, making the log tamper-evident.

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature over the canonical JSON of this artifact (hex-encoded).
